activities_projects.title: Triple Area Square Construction
activities_projects.objective: Construct a square with three times the area of a given square
steps: Draw a square of side 4 cm
Use geometric constructions to combine squares
Create a square with triple area
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies geometric reasoning to construct larger areas

activities_projects.title: Five Times Area Square
activities_projects.objective: Construct a square five times the area of a given square
steps: Draw a square of side 3 cm
Create square with area five times larger

activities_projects.title: Advanced Hypotenuse Estimation
steps: Find squares of numbers between 7 and 8

activities_projects.title: Grid Square Area Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Create squares of different integer areas on a grid
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops spatial reasoning and geometric creativity

activities_projects.title: Generate New Primitive Triples
activities_projects.objective: Create new primitive triples using number patterns
steps: Start with equation a² + b² = c²

activities_projects.title: Rhombus Side Finder
steps: Draw rhombus diagonals intersecting at right angles

activities_projects.title: Integer Rectangle Challenge
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands application of triples in rectangles

activities_projects.title: Equilateral Triangle Area Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Find area of equilateral triangle using theorem
steps: Draw equilateral triangle with side 6 cm

activities_projects.title: Mathematical Proof Activity
activities_projects.objective: Prove a² + b² = c² using square areas
steps: Draw squares on all sides of a right triangle
Show sum of two smaller squares equals largest
